data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for inspector re-verification and sign-off.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the inspector's re-verification and sign-off process. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of endpoints or entities capable of validating this requirement. The only related evidence discusses the creation of bookings and resources, which do not address the specific requirement of inspector sign-off.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities for inspector re-verification and sign-off.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the inspector re-verification and sign-off requirement.
